user.title: Discover CUKTECH Charger
user.description:
Select your CUKTECH charger from the list below.

Found {count} device(s) nearby. Make sure your charger is powered on and within range.

token.title: Authenticate
token.description:
Enter the authentication credentials for:

**{name}** ({address})

The token can be obtained from the Mi Home / Xiaomi Home app.

manual.title: Enter MAC Address
manual.description:
Enter the Bluetooth MAC address of your CUKTECH charger. It can be found in the Mi Home / Xiaomi Home app, or by scanning with a BLE tool.

Format: AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF

error.invalid_mac: Invalid MAC address format. Use AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF or AA-BB-CC-DD-EE-FF.
error.invalid_token_format: Token must be a valid hex string.
error.invalid_token_length: Token must be exactly 12 bytes (24 hex characters).
error.invalid_key_format: BLE key must be a valid hex string.
error.invalid_key_length: BLE key must be exactly 16 bytes (32 hex characters).
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Make sure it is powered on and in range.
error.auth_failed: Authentication failed. Check your token and try again.
error.missing_deps: Missing dependencies. Make sure bleak and cryptography are installed.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check the logs for details.
error.no_devices_found: No CUKTECH chargers found nearby. Make sure the charger is powered on.

abort.no_devices_found: No CUKTECH chargers found. Make sure your charger is powered on and in range.
